Class LegoDsl

java.lang.Object
ch.varani.bricks.ble.api.dsl.LegoDsl
public final class LegoDsl extends Object
Fluent DSL sub-builder for LEGO Wireless Protocol 3.0 (LWP3) operations.

Obtained via ConnectionDsl.asLego(). Provides named methods for every downstream command and upstream notification defined in LWP3, mapping to writes/reads on the single LegoProtocolConstants.HUB_CHARACTERISTIC_UUID characteristic.

Usage example: 

connectionDsl.asLego()
    .requestBatteryVoltage()
    .motor(0x00).startSpeed(80)
    .hubAction().switchOff()
    .done();

Thread safety: not thread-safe; do not share across threads.

DSL maintenance rule: any change to LegoProtocolConstants must be reflected here. See AGENTS.md §16.

    LegoDsl.HubActionBuilder

  • Method Details

    • notifications

      public @NonNull Flow.Publisher<byte[]> notifications()
      Returns a publisher that emits raw LWP3 messages received from the hub.

      Enables BLE notifications on the LEGO Hub characteristic.

      Returns:
      a publisher of raw upstream message bytes; never null

    • requestHubProperty

      public @NonNull CompletableFuture<Void> requestHubProperty(int propertyRef)
      Sends a Hub Properties request-update message for the given property.

      The hub will respond with a Properties Update notification.

      Parameters:
      propertyRef - the hub property reference byte (e.g. LegoProtocolConstants.HUB_PROP_BATTERY_VOLTAGE)
      Returns:
      a future that completes when the write is submitted; never null

    • requestBatteryVoltage

      public @NonNull CompletableFuture<Void> requestBatteryVoltage()
      Requests the current battery voltage percentage from the hub.

      Convenience shortcut for requestHubProperty(HUB_PROP_BATTERY_VOLTAGE).

      Returns:
      a future that completes when the write is submitted; never null

    • requestFirmwareVersion

      public @NonNull CompletableFuture<Void> requestFirmwareVersion()
      Requests the firmware version string from the hub.
      Returns:
      a future that completes when the write is submitted; never null

    • requestHardwareVersion

      public @NonNull CompletableFuture<Void> requestHardwareVersion()
      Requests the hardware version string from the hub.
      Returns:
      a future that completes when the write is submitted; never null

    • requestRssi

      public @NonNull CompletableFuture<Void> requestRssi()
      Requests the RSSI value from the hub.
      Returns:
      a future that completes when the write is submitted; never null

    • enableBatteryVoltageUpdates

      public @NonNull CompletableFuture<Void> enableBatteryVoltageUpdates()
      Enables periodic battery voltage updates from the hub.
      Returns:
      a future that completes when the write is submitted; never null

    • disableBatteryVoltageUpdates

      public @NonNull CompletableFuture<Void> disableBatteryVoltageUpdates()
      Disables periodic battery voltage updates from the hub.
      Returns:
      a future that completes when the write is submitted; never null

    • hubPropertyOperation

      public @NonNull CompletableFuture<Void> hubPropertyOperation(int propertyRef, int operation)
      Sends a Hub Properties message with the given property reference and operation code.
      Parameters:
      propertyRef - the hub property reference byte
      operation - the property operation byte
      Returns:
      a future that completes when the write is submitted; never null

    • hubAction

      public @NonNull LegoDsl.HubActionBuilder hubAction()
      Returns a fluent sub-builder for Hub Action commands.
      Returns:
      the hub-action builder; never null

    • sendHubAction

      public @NonNull CompletableFuture<Void> sendHubAction(int actionType)
      Sends a raw Hub Action command.
      Parameters:
      actionType - the action type byte (e.g. LegoProtocolConstants.HUB_ACTION_SWITCH_OFF)
      Returns:
      a future that completes when the write is submitted; never null

    • enableAlert

      public @NonNull CompletableFuture<Void> enableAlert(int alertType)
      Enables upstream alert updates for the given alert type.
      Parameters:
      alertType - the alert type byte (e.g. LegoProtocolConstants.HUB_ALERT_LOW_VOLTAGE)
      Returns:
      a future that completes when the write is submitted; never null

    • disableAlert

      public @NonNull CompletableFuture<Void> disableAlert(int alertType)
      Disables upstream alert updates for the given alert type.
      Parameters:
      alertType - the alert type byte
      Returns:
      a future that completes when the write is submitted; never null

    • requestAlert

      public @NonNull CompletableFuture<Void> requestAlert(int alertType)
      Requests the current status of the given alert type.
      Parameters:
      alertType - the alert type byte
      Returns:
      a future that completes when the write is submitted; never null

    • sendAlertOperation

      public @NonNull CompletableFuture<Void> sendAlertOperation(int alertType, int operation)
      Sends a Hub Alerts message with the given type and operation.
      Parameters:
      alertType - the alert type byte
      operation - the alert operation byte
      Returns:
      a future that completes when the write is submitted; never null

    • motor

      public @NonNull LegoDsl.MotorBuilder motor(int portId)
      Returns a fluent motor sub-builder for the specified port.
      Parameters:
      portId - the port identifier byte (e.g. 0x00 for port A)
      Returns:
      the motor builder; never null

    • portOutputCommand

      public @NonNull CompletableFuture<Void> portOutputCommand(int portId, int startupCompletion, int subCommand, byte... parameters)
      Sends a raw Port Output Command message.
      Parameters:
      portId - the port identifier byte
      startupCompletion - the startup/completion info nibbles byte
      subCommand - the motor sub-command byte
      parameters - additional sub-command parameters; may be empty
      Returns:
      a future that completes when the write is submitted; never null

    • requestPortInfo

      public @NonNull CompletableFuture<Void> requestPortInfo(int portId, int informationType)
      Sends a Port Information Request for the given port.
      Parameters:
      portId - the port identifier byte
      informationType - the information type byte (0x01=value, 0x02=mode-info, 0x03=combinations)
      Returns:
      a future that completes when the write is submitted; never null

    • requestPortModeInfo

      public @NonNull CompletableFuture<Void> requestPortModeInfo(int portId, int mode, int informationType)
      Sends a Port Mode Information Request for the given port and mode.
      Parameters:
      portId - the port identifier byte
      mode - the mode index byte
      informationType - the mode-information type byte
      Returns:
      a future that completes when the write is submitted; never null

    • done

      public void done() throws BleException
      Disconnects the hub and releases all resources.
      Throws:
      BleException - if the disconnect fails

    • connection

      public @NonNull BleConnection connection()
      Returns the underlying BleConnection.
      Returns:
      the connection; never null
